## Summary


## Checklist

- [ ] Keeps Python 3.6+ compatibility
- [ ] Keeps zero runtime dependencies
- [ ] Adds or updates `unittest` coverage
- [ ] `python3 -m py_compile restore_sql_fast.py` passes
- [ ] `python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v` passes
- [ ] Sensitive data is not included in logs, examples, or tests
